title: Senior AI Engineer
description:
Gizmo is an AI startup on a mission to make learning so easy
that anyone can learn anything. We're building Duolingo for
anything - a platform that uses gamification and social
mechanics to make learning fun.

With over 1.5 million monthly active users and $5M in annual
recurring revenue, we’re already one of the fastest-growing
startups in the UK. Backed by leading investors, we recently
raised $22M in Series A funding to accelerate our vision of
helping 1 billion people learn.

Role Overview As an AI Engineer at Gizmo, you’ll report
directly to the CEO/Co-Founder and play a key role in
shaping the product experience for our rapidly growing user
base.

You’ll work closely with the wider engineering team to
build, test and ship features that bring our vision to life.
This role is ideal for someone looking to develop deep
expertise in evaluating LLMs. You’ll be joining a fast-
paced, collaborative team during an exciting stage of
growth, with plenty of opportunity to make a significant
impact and grow alongside us as we scale.

Key Responsibilities:

- Design and implement AI features by leveraging prompt
  engineering techniques using the latest LLMs e.g. Gemini
  3, ChatGPT 5.
- Use the latest LLM evaluation techniques to assess and
  improve our LLM systems.
- Deploy and integrate AI models into production environments
  using our TypeScript backend.

Requirements

- You are an experienced software engineer (10+ years
  experience) with strong knowledge of Typescript.
- Degree in Machine Learning/Artificial Intelligence OR have
  experience in evaluating AI models and prompts.
- Clear communicator who can break down complexity and
  collaborate effectively.
- Driven by impact - you prioritise work that moves the
  needle.
- Self-starter with a maker mindset. We’re looking for ex-
  founders or individuals with start-up experience.

Benefits
responsibilities: Design and implement AI features using prompt engineering techniques with latest LLMs like Gemini 3 and ChatGPT 5
Apply LLM evaluation techniques to assess and improve AI systems performance
Deploy and integrate AI models into production environments using TypeScript backend
Collaborate with engineering team to build, test and ship AI-powered product features
Shape product experience for rapidly growing user base of 1.5M monthly active users
Develop deep expertise in LLM evaluation methodologies and systems
use_cases: Gamified learning platform that uses AI to make learning easy and fun for anyone
AI-powered educational content generation and personalization
Social and gamified learning mechanics powered by LLMs
Adaptive learning experiences using large language models
Duolingo-style learning for any subject enhanced by AI
ai_classification_reasoning:
The role involves hands-on work with LLMs including prompt
engineering, model evaluation, and deploying AI models into
production. The engineer directly builds, tests, and ships
AI features using models like Gemini 3 and ChatGPT 5.
